previewTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate: Inza Koné - Episode 1

title.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate: Inza Koné - Episode 1

text.value: As a 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate, Inza Koné is protecting one of Côte d’Ivoire’s last remaining primary rainforests, Tanoé-Ehy. The forest teems with life, including species found nowhere else on Earth. The Tanoé-Ehy Forest is also home to some of West Africa’s most endangered species of primate, including the possibly extinct Miss Waldron’s red colobus. Together with the local communities, Koné is protecting the forest to study its flora and fauna and better preserve it for future generations.

pageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Inza Koné - Episode 2

pageCaption.value: In Côte d’Ivoire, 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate Inza Koné draws on the expertise of reformed local poachers to change the fortunes of some of West Africa’s most imperilled primates.

pageCaption.value: Working with dedicated farming families, Laury Cullen Jr. is restoring Brazil’s Atlantic Forest while contributing to the local economy and helping to fight climate change.

metadescription.value: Laury Cullen Jr.’s Dream Map initiative has overseen the planting of four million trees in Brazil’s Atlantic Forest. Watch the video on rolex.org.
